mnemonics.title: CIA for Crypto Goals
mnemonics.content: Remember the goals of cryptography with a twist on the CIA triad: Confidentiality (secrecy), Integrity (no tampering), Authentication (who are you?), Non-repudiation (can't deny it). Think 'CIAN'.

mnemonics.title: Order of Historical Ciphers
mnemonics.content: Can Victor Decipher Every Message? (Caesar -> Vigenère -> DES -> Enigma -> Modern (AES/RSA))

mnemonics.title: Symmetric vs. Asymmetric
mnemonics.content: Symmetric is Single Key (like one key for a locked box). Asymmetric is A Pair of Keys (like a mailbox: public key to drop mail in, private key to open and take it out).
